title: Twilio Telephony Integration
description: Twilio WebSocket bridge relays phone call audio to the agent realtime session

use_cases.name: Place Incoming Phone Call
use_cases.description: Caller dials the Twilio phone number, triggering a webhook POST to /incoming-call

use_cases.name: Handle Incoming Call (TwiML)
use_cases.description: Server responds with TwiML: plays greeting and instructs Twilio to connect call audio to WebSocket /media-stream

use_cases.name: Establish WebSocket Media Stream
use_cases.description: Twilio opens WebSocket to /media-stream; TwilioWebSocketManager.new_session() creates a TwilioHandler

use_cases.name: Start Realtime Agent Session
use_cases.description: TwilioHandler.start() creates RealtimeRunner, calls runner.run() with gpt-realtime-1.5 model config (g711_ulaw, semantic_vad), then session.enter()

use_cases.name: Relay Caller Audio to OpenAI
use_cases.description: _twilio_message_loop receives 'media' events; base64-decodes µ-law audio; buffers chunks (50ms/~400 bytes); sends via session.send_audio() after startup warm-up

use_cases.name: Receive Agent Audio Response
use_cases.description: _realtime_session_loop receives 'audio' events from RealtimeSession; base64-encodes and sends 'media' + 'mark' events back to Twilio WebSocket

use_cases.name: Play Agent Audio to Caller
use_cases.description: Twilio receives media events and plays audio to the caller over the phone

use_cases.name: Handle Audio Interruption
use_cases.description: On 'audio_interrupted' event, sends 'clear' event to Twilio to stop current playback; supports interrupt_response=True

use_cases.name: Track Audio Playback Progress
use_cases.description: Mark events sent with each audio chunk; Twilio echoes mark events back; _handle_mark_event() calls playback_tracker.on_play_bytes() to track playback position

use_cases.name: Execute Function Tools
use_cases.description: Agent uses get_weather(city) and get_current_time() function tools during conversation

use_cases.name: Periodic Buffer Flush
use_cases.description: _buffer_flush_loop runs every 50ms; flushes stale audio buffer if data present and >100ms since last send

use_cases.name: Terminate Call Session
use_cases.description: Twilio sends 'stop' event or WebSocket disconnects; session ends; active_handlers cleanup (noted as TODO)

key_relationships: TwilioHandler depends_on RealtimeRunner to create session
TwilioHandler bridges Twilio WebSocket <-> OpenAI Realtime API
http_endpoints: POST|GET /incoming-call → returns TwiML with Stream WebSocket URL
audio_flow: TwilioHandler: base64 decode → bytearray buffer → chunk 50ms → session.send_audio()
OpenAI Realtime API → RealtimeSession 'audio' event → base64 encode
TwilioHandler → Twilio WebSocket 'media' event → Twilio → Caller audio playback
concurrency: _message_loop_task: asyncio.Task - listens for Twilio WebSocket messages
important_notes: Audio format: G.711 µ-law (mulaw) at 8kHz — Twilio phone call standard
Startup warm-up: buffers first N chunks (default 3) before sending to OpenAI to prevent cold-start issues
Playback tracking: mark events correlate audio chunks to item_id/content_index for interruption support
TwilioWebSocketManager.active_handlers not yet cleaned up on call end (noted as TODO in code)
Server runs on FastAPI + uvicorn, default port 8000
Requires OPENAI_API_KEY env var; ngrok or public URL for Twilio webhook
